summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Single Car Page. The hard-coded 'Lucid Motors Air Pure' issue has been successfully fixed. All user stories PASSED except for a VIN typo in the requirements (JTMK1RFV5ND089501 should be JTMK1RFV7ND089501). Real data from /api/vin/<VIN> and /api/calculator/calculate is correctly displayed.

design_issues.issue: Multiple font preload warnings in console (MazzardH-Medium, MazzardH-Regular, MazzardH-Bold, MazzardM-Light)
design_issues.impact: Performance optimization - fonts are preloaded but not used within a few seconds

passed_tests: ✓ Homepage → Deal Card Click: Clicking 'More details' on a deal card navigates to /cars/<VIN> and shows real data (NOT Lucid Motors)

✓ Nissan Altima (1N4AL3AP4FC574557): H1='2015 Nissan Altima', Breadcrumb='HOME / CATALOG/ 2015 NISSAN ALTIMA', Brand=NISSAN, Model=ALTIMA, Year=2015, Mileage=117,796 KM, Drive=FWD, Engine=2.5 L, LOT=80694245, Auction=COPART, ALL IMAGES (22) tile present

✓ Toyota RAV4 (JTMK1RFV7ND089501): H1='2022 Toyota Rav 4 Le', Bid price=€4,250, Estimated total price=€9,778, Cost Calculator shows non-zero values (CAR & AUCTION=€4,664, LOGISTICS=€1,775, TOTAL=€9,778)
✓ Status Chip: Shows 'LIVE' for active lots (Nissan Altima)
✓ Lightbox Gallery: Opens on hero image click, ArrowRight cycles to next image, Escape closes lightbox
✓ 'View on source auction' Link: Present with valid external href (https://bidmotors.bg/...)
✓ VIN Not Found State: Shows 'VIN not found' message with 'Browse catalog' button for invalid VIN (INVALIDXXX12345670), does NOT show stale Lucid data
✓ Multiple VINs Show Different Data: Tested 3 VINs (Nissan Altima, Toyota RAV4, Chevrolet Volt) - all show unique data
✓ No Critical Console Errors: Only font preload warnings (non-critical)
action_item_for_main_agent: ✅ ALL USER STORIES PASSED. Note: User story #3 mentioned VIN 'JTMK1RFV5ND089501' (with '5') which doesn't exist - the correct VIN is 'JTMK1RFV7ND089501' (with '7'). This appears to be a typo in the requirements. Optional: Consider optimizing font preloading to reduce console warnings.
